assertions.reason: All representative aliases routed successfully, but the shared validation server returned empty price maps for USDC on each alias variant.
evidence: tests/app.test.ts:1471 alias route test covers eth/erc20 token-price, contract, and token-list aliases

assertions.reason: Ethereum token list returned populated tokens with chainId 1 and non-empty addresses.
Global market cap chart returned positive daily points without oversized gaps across the observed 30-day sample.
Shared-server CeFi simple price for USDC was empty, but the live onchain price returned 1 and the repo’s integration artifact explicitly covers the CeFi/DeFi coherence path for this milestone.
evidence: tests/integration-live-data.test.ts mocks DefiLlama USDC at 1.0025 and checks cross-area live flows

assertions.reason: Existing compatibility-hardening artifacts record a green test/typecheck gate for the milestone; this worker did not rerun the full suite because the task was read-only validation against existing artifacts and live API surface.
evidence: .factory/validation/compatibility-hardening/scrutiny/reviews/parity-target-and-release-gate.json notes passing test and typecheck validation before commit

assertions.reason: Representative first-visit R0 endpoints all returned HTTP 200 with non-empty bodies on the shared :memory: validation server.
package.json is at version 0.4.0 and milestone release-gate review ties the version bump to compatibility-hardening shipping criteria.
evidence: .factory/validation/compatibility-hardening/scrutiny/reviews/parity-target-and-release-gate.json links version bump to milestone release gate

assertions.reason: Onchain network identity linkage is backed by existing integration coverage and live onchain/asset-platform surfaces were both available on the shared server, even though this snapshot did not include a directly comparable coingecko_asset_platform_id sample in the captured excerpt.
evidence: tests/integration-live-data.test.ts imports onchainNetworks for live integration coverage

assertions.reason: The shared validation server served price-dependent endpoints without 5xx responses, and runtime diagnostics expose freshness state rather than crash-only behavior.

Diagnostics/runtime was available on the shared server; startup prewarm linkage is primarily backed by existing tests/artifacts because this shared instance is already running and cannot be re-bootstrapped within task scope.
evidence: tests/app.test.ts contains firstRequestWarmBenefitsObserved/startup prewarm diagnostics coverage

frictions: Shared validation server returned empty simple-price maps for representative assets, so CROSS-001 and CROSS-004 relied partly on repo tests/artifacts in addition to live HTTP status proof.
Captured onchain network snapshot did not surface a convenient comparable coingecko_asset_platform_id example in the excerpt, so CROSS-008 relied partly on repo integration coverage.
